relatedness_reasoning: The inbound file contains overdraft usage data (facility utilization metrics), while the outbound file contains a detailed loan repayment schedule with amortization details. These represent fundamentally different financial products and purposes: overdraft monitoring vs. loan repayment planning. No field names, concepts, or data structures overlap meaningfully. The inbound schema lacks customer identity, loan terms, interest rates, amortization schedules, and all other core elements required to construct the outbound repayment schedule.
